"not_pressed", "scrollable-vertical": false}, {"text": "This is your dream journal. Remember to recollect your dreams when you wake up in the morning.

You can have a silent notification ready at dawn to click for the quickest access to a new dream journal entry.

Use hashtags to mark general themes in your dreams for easier searching and to collect them in the 'Dream Patterns' module.

You may be surprised about what you find in your own dreams once you start getting in touch with your dream memory and you may learn new sides about yourself.
